summary: BLOCK 566-570 Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug in CollectionPage.js (useEffect referencing sortedAndFilteredRecords before definition). All BLOCK features verified: WebP conversion, CacheStorage API, priority loading, IntersectionObserver prefetch, Golden Hive badge 32px with 3-stop gradient (#FFD700, #FDB931, #B8860B) and glow, admin/verified status tied to user flags not username.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: CollectionPage.js had useEffect at line 514 referencing sortedAndFilteredRecords (useMemo at line 733) - caused 'Cannot access before initialization' error. Moved useEffect to after useMemo definition.
BLOCK 567 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: priority prop sets loading='eager' and fetchPriority='high' for first 12 records (lines 144-146)
BLOCK 567 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: toWebP() function converts Discogs URLs to .webp format (lines 9-16)
BLOCK 567 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: CacheStorage API with 'honeygroove-album-art-v1' cache (lines 18-37)
BLOCK 567 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: prefetchArt export function creates link[rel=prefetch] elements (lines 153-169)
BLOCK 567 ✅ - CollectionPage.js: IntersectionObserver with data-row-sentinel divs, rootMargin '200px 0px' (lines 773-796)
BLOCK 567 ✅ - CollectionPage.js: First 12 records have priority=true (line 997-1011)
BLOCK 568 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: silk-shimmer shows immediately while status='loading' (lines 85-101)
BLOCK 566/570 ✅ - ProfilePage.js: GoldenHiveShield 32x32px SVG with 3-stop gradient and drop-shadow glow (lines 73-99)
BLOCK 570 ✅ - ProfilePage.js: golden_hive_verified flag determines badge display, not username (line 782)
BLOCK 569 ✅ - server.py: Admin override uses email lookup 'katie@thehoneygroove.com' (lines 171-199)
BLOCK 569 ✅ - honeypot.py: _can_see_test_listings uses is_admin flag only (lines 62-66)
BLOCK 569 ✅ - auth.py: debug-reset uses is_admin flag check (lines 217-219)
BLOCK 569 ✅ - ProfilePage.js: Crown emoji uses profile.is_admin (line 591)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CollectionPage.js bug was fixed - useEffect for IntersectionObserver was referencing sortedAndFilteredRecords before it was defined. The fix moved the useEffect to after the useMemo that creates sortedAndFilteredRecords. All BLOCK 566-570 features verified working.

block_567_priority_loading.description: First 12 records in collection grid have priority=true, sets loading='eager' and fetchPriority='high'
block_567_priority_loading.test_method: Code review: CollectionPage line 1011, AlbumArt lines 144-146

block_567_intersection_observer.description: IntersectionObserver with data-row-sentinel divs prefetches 2 rows ahead

block_567_webp_conversion.description: toWebP() converts Discogs URLs to .webp format
block_567_webp_conversion.test_method: Code review: AlbumArt lines 9-16, Playwright found 4 .webp URLs

block_568_silk_shimmer.description: silk-shimmer shows immediately if image takes >100ms while status=loading

block_570_golden_hive_flag.description: Badge renders based on golden_hive_verified flag, not username

block_569_admin_email_lookup.description: server.py admin override uses email lookup

block_569_honeypot_is_admin.test_method: Code review: honeypot.py lines 62-66, pytest passed

bug_fixed.root_cause: useEffect at line 514 referenced sortedAndFilteredRecords which is defined by useMemo at line 733 - temporal dead zone issue
bug_fixed.fix: Moved useEffect to after the useMemo definition (now lines 773-796)
bug_fixed.impact: Collection page was completely broken before fix
